Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Phillip Wang, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gordon & Rees LLP.
Plaintiff's Witness: Rick Cannel, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Emmanuel I. Bernabe, Sr. as follows:
Damages $1,106,538.95
Prejudgment Interest $98,223.84
Attorney's Fees $25,312.50
Costs $498.90 for a total of $1,230,574.19
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Continued To Jan-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2007 Continued To Jan-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
